home.tagline: Collect and send money instantly. No bank. No hidden fees.
home.cobrar_sub: Generate a link and share it with your customer
home.cobrar_tag: Your money goes directly to your account
home.remesa_sub: Transfer to anywhere in the world
home.trust_no_storage: No database. No storage. Just you and your customer.
home.trust_instant: Instant payments via Visa / Mastercard network

cobrar.title: Collect payment
cobrar.client_phone_placeholder: Customer phone (to send the payment link)
cobrar.client_phone_hint: Payment link will be sent via SMS to the customer
cobrar.share_hint: Share the link with your customer:

pagar.title: Pay
pagar.stripe_trust: Secure payment processed by Stripe. Your card data never touches OmniPay servers.
pagar.stripe_redirect_note: You will be redirected to Stripe's secure payment page
pagar.invalid_link: This link is not valid or has expired

remesa.title: Send remittance
remesa.confirm_note: By confirming you authorize the transfer through the selected provider.
remesa.error_generic: Error processing the remittance. Please try again.

resultado.failed_sub: Check your details and try again.
resultado.receipt_note: Read-only receipt. Contains no bank or card data.
